query: IsoAid Advantage I-125 brachytherapy seed AAPM dose rate constant
citations: [Study of the IsoAid ADVANTAGE (125)I brachytherapy source dosimetric parameters using Monte Carlo simulation.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/19762248/)

evidence.claim:
PubMed ID: 19762248. 2010/01/01 00:00. PURPOSE: Dose distributions are calculated by Monte Carlo (MC) simulations for 
two low-energy models 125I brachytherapy source-IrSeed-125 and IsoAid Advantage
evidence.source_title: Study of the IsoAid ADVANTAGE (125)I brachytherapy source dosimetric parameters using Monte Carlo simulation.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 19762248. 2010/01/01 00:00. PURPOSE: Dose distributions are calculated by Monte Carlo (MC) simulations for 
two low-energy models 125I brachytherapy source-IrSeed-125 and IsoAid Advantage 
(model IAI-125A)-loaded in the 14-mm standardized plaque of the COMS during 
treatment of choroid melanoma.
METHODS: In this study, at first, the radial dose function in water around 125I 
brachytherapy sources was calculated based on the recommendations of the Task 
Group No. 43 American Associatio
evidence.search_query: IsoAid Advantage I-125 brachytherapy seed AAPM dose rate constant
